description_long: This is a cylindrical metal can with a ribbed orange and purple gradient exterior, featuring a glossy printed label. The front displays the brand 'FALANI' in a red diamond logo, with 'PÊSSEGO EM CALDA' (peach in syrup) and a net weight of 485g prominently shown. One side of the can has a detailed nutritional information panel in Portuguese, printed on a white background. The top of the can is metallic and appears to be sealed, indicating it is unopened. The surface is smooth and reflective, typical of food cans, and there are no visible handles or reinforcement bands. The can is likely used for food storage and is commonly found in kitchens or grocery settings.
description: A ribbed, orange-to-purple metal can with a glossy label for 'FALANI' peaches in syrup, featuring nutritional info and a sealed metallic top.
description_view_0: The can's side is visible with a partial view of the nutritional information label and the ribbed orange exterior.
description_view_1: This view focuses on the nutritional information panel, showing it in full detail against the ribbed orange surface.
description_view_2: The can's side is mostly plain orange with a partial glimpse of the main product label and no visible text.
description_view_3: The front of the can displays the 'FALANI' logo, product name, and weight, with a colorful label and ribbed texture.
attribute_labeling_or_markings: brand logo, product name, nutritional information, weight, decorative graphics
